summary: Iteration 8 - Full wallet system, coupon management, admin delegation, subscription plans, and admin statistics tested. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All wallet, marketplace, and admin portal tabs verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Login response correctly returns wallet_balance and is_delegated_admin fields
Wallet tab shows balance, 5 top-up packages ($5-$100), coupon redemption, transaction history
Marketplace shows wallet balance in header and supports both free and paid word banks
Admin portal has all 7 tabs: Statistics, AI Costs, Users, Coupons, Plans, LLM Config, App Settings
Coupon types supported: wallet_credit, free_stories, free_students, free_days
Admin delegation allows granting/revoking admin privileges to non-admin users
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library for checkout sessions

test_credentials.admin: email: testadmin@test.com, password: test123 (role: admin, balance: $10.00)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing data: WELCOME10 coupon ($10 wallet credit), Family Plan subscription
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified wallet, coupon, and admin features. WELCOME10 coupon was already redeemed by testadmin (1/100 uses). Family Plan subscription exists ($9.99/mo, 25 seats). Admin has $10.00 wallet balance. Stripe topup creates real checkout sessions. Payment status polling handles idempotent wallet crediting.

backend_api_tests: Login returns wallet_balance and is_delegated_admin - PASSED
POST /api/wallet/topup - creates Stripe checkout session - PASSED
POST /api/admin/coupons - creates free_stories, free_students, free_days - PASSED
GET /api/admin/users - lists all users without password_hash - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Guardian Portal loads with 4 tabs: Students, Marketplace, Wallet, Progress - PASSED
Wallet tab has 5 package buttons - PASSED
Wallet tab has coupon input and redeem button - PASSED
Wallet tab shows transaction history with WELCOME10 redemption - PASSED
Marketplace tab shows wallet balance in header - PASSED
Marketplace shows word banks with FREE and BUY buttons - PASSED
Statistics tab shows guardians, teachers, students, word banks, stories, revenue, AI costs - PASSED
Users tab shows all users with delegate grant/revoke functionality - PASSED
Coupons tab shows create form and WELCOME10 coupon - PASSED
Plans tab shows create form and Family Plan - PASSED
